message.content:
(1) PASS - Header search shows 'Rechercher…' and is compact.  
(2) PASS - KPI cards fit 2-per-row without overflow.  
(3) PASS - Search bar + 'Tous' filter stack vertically and are usable.  
(4) PASS - Datatable is horizontally scrollable with a thin scrollbar (not cut off).  
(5) PASS - Pagination bar stacks vertically (Affichage text + Lignes selector + page buttons).
